DEFT MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE - FILED
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/EMMOD:DEFENDANT OFF CURFEW AND MAY TRAVEL OUTSIDE 50 MILE RADIUS FROM FRIDAY 11-19-21 9PM UNTIL SATURDAY EVENING 11-20-21 9PM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/EMMOD:DEFENDANT'S CURFEW IS MODIFIED FROM 7 AM TO 9 PM/X:ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS TO REMAIN THE SAME/CONT/DOP/X:TBH WITH #21007833/

/CAL: DA MTR FILING/X: NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION FILEDBY THE DA,/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/TBH:(21007833)/PROB ADM REV/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/WEAP/X: AS A CONDITION OF ACM, DEFENDANTIS TO ABIDE BY A CURFEW FROM 7AM TO 7PM,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/BWR: 03-01-21/BWR1/BFSA: 03-01-21/X:CONSENT OF REINSTATEMENT OF BAIL FILED IN OPEN COURT,/MO GRTD/CTORD:BOND REINSTATED/BAIL: 15000/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 05-18-21 (30TH)/X:60TH DAY IS 06-07-21/WEAP/WS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/X: DEFENDANT WAS IN COURT, BUT WAS ASKED TO GO GET A BOND REASSUMPTION LETTER/X; THE DEFENDANT NEVER REAPPEARED/X: AS A FRIEND OF THE COURT JARED RUDOLPH WILL TRY TO TRACK DOWN DEFENDANTTO APPEAR AT THE NEXT DATE/CONTD: MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT, FTA ARRAIGNMENT, REFER TO ROOM 475 FOR ID PROCESSING AND BOND REASSUMPTION LETTERNEEDED/
/CAL:DA MTR HRG/CONTD:PHC ON DA MTR AT 9:30AM & DA MTR HRG IN DEPT, 22/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/MO GRTD/EMTERM/WS/X:ALL FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/
/CAL:PHC ON DA MTR/DAWT/X:04-08-22 DA MTR HEARING CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/CONTD:PHC ON DA MTR & DA MTR HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR;TBH WITH #21007833/CTORD: ACM MODIFIED TO REPORTING 3 TIMESBY PHONE AND PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/ /CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 27/TRANS 27:FORTHWITH FOR TS DA MTR/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:2/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
